testcase.name: ConfirmDialog > renders title
ConfirmDialog > renders description when provided
ConfirmDialog > calls onConfirm when confirm button is clicked
ConfirmDialog > calls onClose when cancel button is clicked
ConfirmDialog > calls onClose when Escape key is pressed
ConfirmDialog > uses custom confirmLabel when provided
ConfirmDialog > applies danger class to confirm button when danger prop is true
ConfirmDialog > cancel button receives initial focus
EmptyState > renders title
EmptyState > renders icon when provided
EmptyState > renders subtitle when provided
EmptyState > renders action buttons
EmptyState > calls onClick when action button clicked
EmptyState > renders keyboard shortcut label when provided
EmptyState > renders nothing for icon when not provided
FsWatcherService > attaches fs.watch on watchStart
FsWatcherService > does not re-attach if already watching same root
FsWatcherService > delivers change events to registered handlers
FsWatcherService > falls back to polling when fs.watch throws
FsWatcherService > stops watcher on watchStop
FsWatcherService > stops watching when last handler is removed
api.notifications.showToast > sends extension:toast IPC message to all windows
api.notifications.showToast > sends error toast with correct type
api.shell.exec > calls execShell with correct args for git command
api.shell.exec > rejects with COMMAND_NOT_ALLOWED for non-allowlisted commands
api.nativeMenu.addViewMenuItem > adds item and returns a disposable
api.nativeMenu.addViewMenuItem > dispose removes item from registry
api.sidebar.registerPanel > registers a panel and returns a disposable
api.sidebar.registerPanel > throws SLOT_ALREADY_REGISTERED when same slot registered twice by same extension
api.sidebar.registerPanel > allows different extensions to register in same slot
api.settings workspace precedence > returns global value when no workspace override exists
api.settings workspace precedence > returns workspace value over global when workspace override exists
api.settings workspace precedence > falls back to global value when workspace has no override for the key
api.settings workspace precedence > returns undefined when key not set globally or in workspace
api.settings workspace precedence > ignores workspace values when no workspace ID getter provided
extension git-service > getStatus > returns parsed status with branch
extension git-service > getStatus > returns HEAD when branch command fails
extension git-service > getDiff > returns unstaged diff for false staged flag
extension git-service > getDiff > passes --cached for staged diff
extension git-service > stageFiles > calls git add with the paths
extension git-service > unstageFiles > calls git restore --staged
extension git-service > commitChanges > extracts short hash from commit output
extension git-service > commitChanges > returns empty string when hash not found
extension git-service > commitChanges > appends --signoff when requested
ExtensionAPI keyboard > keyboard.register with non-reserved accelerator returns Disposable
ExtensionAPI keyboard > keyboard.register throws synchronously for reserved shortcut CmdOrCtrl+T
ExtensionAPI keyboard > disposing the returned Disposable removes the handler
ExtensionHost > activate error sets extension status to error without crashing host
ExtensionHost > invalid manifest returns INVALID_MANIFEST error
ExtensionHost > listExtensions returns list of registered extensions
ExtensionHost > unload is a no-op for unknown extension id
ExtensionHost > toggle returns null for unknown extension id
ExtensionHost > loadAll does not throw when no extensions are stored
ExtensionHost > loadBundledExtensions does not throw for non-existent directory
ExtensionHost > isVersionCompatible: version > minVersion is compatible
ExtensionHost > DUPLICATE_ID error when loading same extension twice
useGitStore > setStatus > stores the given status
useGitStore > setStatus > clears status when set to null
useGitStore > setSelectedFile > stores the selected file path
useGitStore > setSelectedFile > clears selected file when set to null
useGitStore > setDiff > adds diff to cache by path
useGitStore > setDiff > stores multiple diffs independently
useGitStore > setDiff > overwrites existing diff for the same path
useGitStore > setLoading > sets isLoading to true
useGitStore > setLoading > sets isLoading to false
useGitStore > clearDiffCache > removes all cached diffs
github:list-open-prs > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing repoRoot
github:list-open-prs > returns RATE_LIMITED error on rate limit message
github:list-open-prs > returns error string for non-rate-limit gh failure
github:list-open-prs > returns RATE_LIMITED for "rate limit" phrasing
github:list-open-prs > looks up a single PR by number when search is a digit string
github:list-open-prs > searches PRs by text when search is non-numeric
github:pr-review-detail > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing prNumber
github:pr-review-detail > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for non-integer prNumber
github:pr-review-detail > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing repoRoot
github:pr-review-detail > returns RATE_LIMITED on rate limit error
github:pr-file-diff > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing path
github:pr-file-diff > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing repoRoot
github:pr-file-diff > returns error string on subprocess failure
github:file-metrics > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing path
github:file-metrics > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for empty path
github:file-metrics > returns metrics when git commands succeed
github:pr-inline-comments > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing prNumber
github:pr-inline-comments > returns RATE_LIMITED on rate limit error
github:pr-inline-comments > returns parsed comments on success
github:pr-inline-comments > correctly marks replies
github:pr-comment-add > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing required fields
github:pr-comment-add > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid side value
github:pr-comment-add > returns error string on gh failure
github:pr-comment-add > includes start_line and start_side fields when startLine is provided
github:pr-comment-reply > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing inReplyToId
github:pr-comment-reply > returns error on gh failure
github:pr-comment-reply > returns posted comment on success
github:pr-review-submit > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid event
github:pr-review-submit > returns reviewId on success
github:pr-review-submit > accepts all valid event types
github:pr-review-submit > returns error string on gh failure
github:sessions-for-repo > returns empty sessions for invalid payload
github:sessions-for-repo > returns empty sessions when no keys match repoRoot
github:sessions-for-repo > returns sessions whose keys start with repoRoot:::
github:sessions-for-repo > skips entries that fail schema validation
github:session-get > returns session null for missing key
github:session-get > returns session null when key not in store
github:session-get > returns stored session when key exists and data is valid
github:session-get > returns session null when stored data fails schema validation
github:session-set > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing key
github:session-set > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid session data
github:session-set > stores valid session and returns ok
buildThreads > returns empty array for no comments
buildThreads > creates one thread per unique threadId
buildThreads > groups replies under the same thread
buildThreads > sorts comments by createdAt within a thread
buildThreads > sets thread metadata from root comment
buildThreads > marks thread as outdated when any comment is outdated
buildThreads > thread is not outdated when no comments are outdated
buildThreads > collapses thread when there are 4 or more replies
buildThreads > does not collapse thread with fewer than 4 replies
buildThreads > uses threadId as the thread id
buildThreads > handles multiple separate threads correctly
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setQueue replaces the PR queue
usePrReviewStore > queue management > appendQueue adds to existing queue
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setQueueLoading updates queueLoading
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setLoadingMorePrs updates loadingMorePrs
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setQueueError sets error message
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setQueueError clears error with null
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setHasMorePrs updates flag
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setNextPrCursor stores cursor
usePrReviewStore > queue management > setIncludeClosedPrs toggles inclusion
usePrReviewStore > active review state > setActivePr stores the PR detail
usePrReviewStore > active review state > setActivePr clears with null
usePrReviewStore > active review state > setCurrentChapter updates currentChapterId
usePrReviewStore > active review state > setCurrentFile updates currentFilePath
usePrReviewStore > viewed files tracking > markFileViewed adds file to viewedFiles set
usePrReviewStore > viewed files tracking > markFileViewed is idempotent
usePrReviewStore > viewed files tracking > unmarkFileViewed removes file from viewedFiles
usePrReviewStore > file reordering > reorderFiles updates fileOrderOverrides
usePrReviewStore > file reordering > reorderFiles preserves overrides for other chapters
usePrReviewStore > scroll and pause state > setScrollPosition stores position
usePrReviewStore > scroll and pause state > setScrollPosition clears with null
usePrReviewStore > scroll and pause state > setPaused stores timestamp
usePrReviewStore > scroll and pause state > setPaused clears with null
usePrReviewStore > threads > setThreads stores thread list by path
usePrReviewStore > threads > setThreads overwrites existing threads for the same path
usePrReviewStore > updateFileRiskScore > updates risk score for file in specified chapter
usePrReviewStore > updateFileRiskScore > is a no-op when activePr is null
usePrReviewStore > updateQueuePrRisk > updates risk level and signal dots for matching PR
usePrReviewStore > updateQueuePrRisk > does not affect other PRs in the queue
usePrReviewStore > setRateLimitState > stores rate limit state
usePrReviewStore > setRateLimitState > clears rate limit state with null
usePrReviewStore > initSession > restores session state from ReviewSession object
usePrReviewStore > initSession > converts viewedFiles array to Set
usePrReviewStore > reset > clears active PR, chapters, viewed files, and threads
usePrReviewStore > reset > does not clear prQueue
usePrReviewStore > patchFileComplexity > updates complexity delta and adjusts composite score
usePrReviewStore > patchFileComplexity > is a no-op when activePr is null
usePrReviewStore > patchFileComplexity > does not modify files in other chapters
parseStatus > returns empty result for blank stdout
parseStatus > returns empty result for whitespace-only stdout
parseStatus > parses untracked file
parseStatus > parses ignored file
parseStatus > parses staged modified file (M in index, clean worktree)
parseStatus > parses unstaged modified file
parseStatus > parses staged added file
parseStatus > parses staged deleted file
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for UU
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for AA
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for DD
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for AU
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for UA
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for DU
parseStatus > sets hasConflicts for UD
parseStatus > parses renamed file (two NUL-separated entries)
parseStatus > parses copy (C) the same way as rename
parseStatus > parses multiple files from NUL-delimited output
parseStatus > truncates at maxFiles and sets truncated flag
parseStatus > truncated is false when exactly at maxFiles limit with no remaining
parseStatus > skips entries shorter than 3 chars
parseStatus > does not set hasConflicts when no conflict codes present
parseStatus > defaults unknown xy code to modified
parseDiff > detects binary file diff
parseDiff > returns empty hunks for empty diff output
parseDiff > parses a single hunk with add/remove/context lines
parseDiff > tracks line numbers across add/remove/context correctly
parseDiff > parses multiple hunks
parseDiff > sets truncated flag when content exceeds maxBytes
parseDiff > does not set truncated when content fits in maxBytes
parseDiff > ignores diff header lines (diff --git, index, ---, +++)
parseDiff > returns path as empty string (caller must set it)
parseDiff > @@ header without line count still parses (defaults to line 1)
getStatus > returns parsed status with branch name
getStatus > falls back to HEAD when branch command fails
getStatus > passes maxFiles to parser
getDiff > calls git diff without --cached for unstaged
getDiff > calls git diff --cached for staged changes
getDiff > attaches path to parsed diff result
stageFiles > calls git add with the given paths
unstageFiles > calls git restore --staged with the given paths
commitChanges > returns short hash from commit output
commitChanges > returns empty string when hash cannot be parsed
commitChanges > appends --signoff when signOff is true
commitChanges > does not append --signoff by default
isGitRepo > returns true when rev-parse succeeds
isGitRepo > returns false when rev-parse fails
getGitRoot > returns trimmed repo root path
getCurrentBranch > returns branch name
getCurrentBranch > returns HEAD when branch output is empty
listBranches > lists local branches
listBranches > marks current branch with isCurrent
listBranches > deduplicates remote branches that have a local equivalent
listBranches > omits HEAD from remote branch list
listBranches > returns empty array for empty output
checkoutBranch > calls git checkout with the branch name
suggestWorktreePath > defaults to repoRoot/.worktrees/<safeBranch>
suggestWorktreePath > uses baseDir when provided
suggestWorktreePath > replaces slashes, backslashes, colons, and spaces in branch name
listWorktrees > parses porcelain worktree list
listWorktrees > uses HEAD as branch fallback when branch line is absent
createWorktree > uses -b flag when creating a new branch
createWorktree > does not use -b flag for existing branch
removeWorktree > calls git worktree remove --force
App > renders WorkspaceRail
App > renders ToastContainer
App > calls loadWorkspaces and loadSettings on mount
App > shows ProjectsPanel when activeWorkspaceId is set
App > does not show ProjectsPanel when no activeWorkspaceId
App > shows TerminalPane when activeProjectId is set
App > shows EmptyState with workspace prompt when activeWorkspaceId but no project and welcome seen
App > shows Welcome to Terminator EmptyState when no welcome seen
App > shows select workspace prompt when globalSettings is null
App > does not show SettingsPanel by default
App > opens SettingsPanel when open-settings event fires
App > closes SettingsPanel when onClose is called
App > does not show LogWindow by default
App > subscribes to terminal process exit events on mount
App > calls loadSettings with activeWorkspaceId when workspace changes
App > calls markWelcomeSeen when activeProjectId is set and welcome not seen
App > calls onMenuOpenSettings extensionEvent to open settings panel
App > calls onToast extensionEvent to display a toast
App > calls onTogglePanel extensionEvent to toggle a panel
App > calls onSelectProjectTab extensionEvent to set active tab
PrReviewWindow > renders PrReviewTab and ToastContainer
PrReviewWindow > passes repoRoot from URL params to PrReviewTab
PrReviewWindow > passes null repoRoot when not in URL params
PrReviewWindow > renders accent bar when accentColor param is present
PrReviewWindow > does not render accent bar when accentColor param is absent
PrReviewWindow > calls loadSettings on mount
PrReviewWindow > sets data-theme attribute from resolvedTheme
FileStatusSchema > accepts all valid status values
FileStatusSchema > rejects unknown status
GitFileStatusSchema > parses a modified staged file
GitFileStatusSchema > parses a renamed file with originalPath
GitFileStatusSchema > defaults isBinary to false
GitFileStatusSchema > rejects empty path
GitStatusSchema > parses a clean git status
GitStatusSchema > parses status with files
GitStatusSchema > sets truncated flag when file list is capped
GitStatusSchema > sets hasConflicts when conflicts present
GitStatusSchema > defaults truncated to false
SignalDotsSchema > accepts valid signal dots
SignalDotsSchema > accepts all signal values
SignalDotsSchema > rejects invalid signal value
RiskScoreSchema > accepts valid risk score
RiskScoreSchema > accepts null composite
RiskScoreSchema > accepts all risk levels
RiskScoreSchema > rejects invalid risk level
RiskScoreSchema > accepts null metric values
FileMetricsSchema > accepts valid file metrics
FileMetricsSchema > requires path string
PrChangedFileSchema > accepts valid changed file
PrChangedFileSchema > accepts renamed file with oldPath
PrChangedFileSchema > accepts all change types
PrChangedFileSchema > accepts all tier values
PrChangedFileSchema > rejects invalid tier
ChapterSchema > accepts valid chapter
ChapterSchema > accepts all chapter statuses
ChapterSchema > accepts chapter with no files
ReviewQueuePRSchema > accepts valid review queue PR
ReviewQueuePRSchema > accepts all CI statuses
ReviewQueuePRSchema > accepts optional resumeChapter fields
ReviewQueuePRSchema > accepts draft PRs
ReviewQueuePRSchema > rejects non-numeric PR number
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts valid session
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts null currentChapterId
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts null currentFilePath
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts null scrollPosition
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts non-null pausedAt timestamp
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts empty viewedFiles
ReviewSessionSchema > rejects missing repoRoot
InlineCommentSchema > accepts valid inline comment
InlineCommentSchema > accepts both side values
InlineCommentSchema > rejects invalid side
InlineCommentSchema > accepts reply with parentId
ThreadSchema > accepts valid thread
ThreadSchema > accepts thread with startLine
ThreadSchema > rejects thread without required fields
TerminalSessionSchema > accepts a valid session
TerminalSessionSchema > accepts optional closedAt
TerminalSessionSchema > rejects invalid status
TerminalSessionSchema > rejects invalid type
TerminalSessionSchema > rejects non-UUID id
TerminalSessionSchema > rejects empty tabTitle
TerminalSessionSchema > rejects scrollbackLimit below 1000
TerminalSessionSchema > rejects scrollbackLimit above 100000
TerminalSessionSchema > accepts all valid status values
TerminalSessionSchema > accepts both session types
CreateSessionInputSchema > accepts valid input
CreateSessionInputSchema > accepts optional shell
CreateSessionInputSchema > rejects empty cwd
CreateSessionInputSchema > rejects non-UUID projectId
CreateSessionInputSchema > rejects tabTitle longer than 100 chars
ShellExecOptionsSchema > accepts git command
ShellExecOptionsSchema > accepts gh command
ShellExecOptionsSchema > rejects non-allowlisted command
ShellExecOptionsSchema > rejects empty cwd
ShellExecOptionsSchema > defaults timeoutMs to 10000
ShellExecOptionsSchema > accepts custom timeoutMs
ShellExecOptionsSchema > rejects negative timeoutMs
ShellResultSchema > parses a successful result
ShellResultSchema > parses a timed-out result
WorkspaceSchema > accepts a valid workspace
WorkspaceSchema > rejects empty name
WorkspaceSchema > rejects name over 100 characters
WorkspaceSchema > rejects invalid hex color
WorkspaceSchema > rejects more than 20 tags
WorkspaceSchema > accepts workspace with zero tags
WorkspaceSchema > accepts workspace with exactly 20 tags
ProjectSchema > accepts a valid project
ProjectSchema > rejects empty project name
validateName() > accepts valid kebab-case names
validateName() > rejects names starting with a number
validateName() > rejects uppercase letters
validateName() > rejects names shorter than 3 characters
validateName() > rejects names with spaces
validateId() > accepts valid reverse-domain IDs
validateId() > rejects IDs without dots
validateId() > rejects IDs with uppercase
generateManifest() > generates valid JSON manifest with correct fields
generateIndex() > generates index with activate and deactivate exports
generateIndex() > includes all v1.1.0 API surface stubs
generateIndex() > includes commented-out stubs for v1.1.0 surfaces
settings-store > getGlobalSettings returns defaults
settings-store > updateGlobalSettings merges patch
settings-store > getWorkspaceSettings returns global defaults when no override
settings-store > updateWorkspaceSettings stores workspace-scoped override
settings-store > workspace override takes precedence — test via resolveSettings logic
workspace-store > creates a workspace and returns it
workspace-store > rejects duplicate workspace name with DUPLICATE_NAME error
workspace-store > update rejects duplicate name
workspace-store > lists all workspaces
workspace-store > deletes workspace and its projects
workspace-store > creates a project within a workspace
workspace-store > rejects duplicate project name within same workspace
workspace-store > allows same project name in different workspaces
workspace-store > createProject returns WORKSPACE_NOT_FOUND for unknown workspace
workspace-store > createProject returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid input
workspace-store > updateProjectBranch updates the branch on a project
workspace-store > updateProjectBranch returns NOT_FOUND for unknown project
workspace-store > updateProjectBranch returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid input
workspace-store > deleteProject removes the project
workspace-store > renameProject renames an existing project
workspace-store > renameProject returns NOT_FOUND for unknown project
workspace-store > renameProject returns DUPLICATE_NAME when name conflicts
workspace-store > reorderWorkspaces reorders workspaces by id list
workspace-store > reorderWorkspaces returns success: false for invalid input
workspace-store > reorderProjects reorders projects within a workspace
workspace-store > reorderProjects returns success: false for invalid input
workspace-store > updateWorkspace returns NOT_FOUND for unknown workspace id
workspace-store > updateWorkspace returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid input
workspace-store > updateWorkspace updates workspace name
assertCommandAllowed > allows git
assertCommandAllowed > allows gh
assertCommandAllowed > throws CommandNotAllowedError for rm
assertCommandAllowed > throws CommandNotAllowedError for curl
assertCommandAllowed > thrown error has COMMAND_NOT_ALLOWED code
assertCommandAllowed > thrown error message names the disallowed command
assertCwdInScope > allows cwd exactly equal to workspaceRoot
assertCwdInScope > allows cwd inside workspaceRoot
assertCwdInScope > allows deeply nested cwd inside workspaceRoot
assertCwdInScope > throws CwdOutOfScopeError when cwd is outside workspaceRoot
assertCwdInScope > throws CwdOutOfScopeError for path traversal attempt (../escape)
assertCwdInScope > throws CwdOutOfScopeError when cwd is relative
assertCwdInScope > throws CwdOutOfScopeError when workspaceRoot is relative
assertCwdInScope > thrown error has CWD_OUT_OF_SCOPE code
execShell > resolves with exitCode 0 and stdout on success
execShell > resolves with non-zero exitCode when process fails
execShell > resolves with exitCode 1 when error code is non-numeric
execShell > marks timedOut when SIGTERM close signal fires before callback
execShell > passes sanitized env variables to child process
PtyManager > spawn creates a PTY and returns sessionId
PtyManager > resize calls pty.resize
PtyManager > write sends data to PTY
PtyManager > kill terminates process
PtyManager > killAll terminates all tracked PTY processes
useExtensionRegistry > registerSidebarPanel > adds panel to sidebarPanels map
useExtensionRegistry > registerSidebarPanel > opens panel when defaultOpen is true
useExtensionRegistry > registerSidebarPanel > does not open panel when defaultOpen is false
useExtensionRegistry > registerSidebarPanel > returns dispose function that removes the panel
useExtensionRegistry > registerSidebarPanel > dispose also removes panel from openPanels
useExtensionRegistry > registerProjectTab > adds tab to projectTabs map
useExtensionRegistry > registerProjectTab > returns dispose function that removes the tab
useExtensionRegistry > registerProjectTab > clears activeProjectTabId when active tab is disposed
useExtensionRegistry > registerProjectTab > does not clear activeProjectTabId when a different tab is disposed
useExtensionRegistry > registerKeyboardShortcut > adds shortcut to keyboardShortcuts array
useExtensionRegistry > registerKeyboardShortcut > returns dispose function that removes the shortcut
useExtensionRegistry > registerKeyboardShortcut > only removes the exact shortcut instance, not others
useExtensionRegistry > togglePanel > opens closed panel
useExtensionRegistry > togglePanel > closes open panel
useExtensionRegistry > setActiveProjectTab > sets activeProjectTabId
useExtensionRegistry > setActiveProjectTab > sets activeProjectTabId to null
matchesAccelerator > matches CmdOrCtrl+Shift+G with Ctrl held on non-Mac
matchesAccelerator > matches CmdOrCtrl+Shift+G with Meta held on Mac
matchesAccelerator > does not match when key differs
matchesAccelerator > does not match when shift is required but not held
matchesAccelerator > does not match when no modifier is held but accelerator requires one
matchesAccelerator > matches accelerator without shift modifier
matchesAccelerator > matches Alt+F4 style shortcut
matchesAccelerator > is case-insensitive for key comparison
useLogStore > addEntry > adds an entry with sequential id, level, and message
useLogStore > addEntry > assigns incrementing ids across multiple entries
useLogStore > addEntry > includes a timestamp string
useLogStore > addEntry > caps log at 1000 entries, dropping oldest
useLogStore > clear > removes all entries
installLogInterceptor > intercepts console.log calls and stores them as log entries
installLogInterceptor > intercepts console.warn and stores as warn level
testcase.system-err: intercepted warn

testcase.name: installLogInterceptor > intercepts console.error and stores as error level
testcase.system-err: intercepted error

testcase.name: installLogInterceptor > serializes object arguments to JSON
installLogInterceptor > joins multiple arguments with spaces
useSessionStore > createSession > creates a session and stores it
useSessionStore > createSession > throws when terminal.create returns an error
useSessionStore > closeSession > removes session from store
useSessionStore > closeSession > disposes xterm instance if present
useSessionStore > closeSession > clears bell count for closed session
useSessionStore > closeSession > updates activeSessionIdByProject when closed session was active
useSessionStore > closeSession > removes project from activeSessionIdByProject when last session closed
useSessionStore > getSessionsForProject > returns only sessions belonging to the given project
useSessionStore > getSessionsForProject > returns empty array for unknown project
useSessionStore > setActiveSessionForProject > marks the given session as active and others as backgrounded
useSessionStore > setActiveSessionForProject > clears bell count for the newly active session
useSessionStore > setActiveSessionForProject > sets activeSessionIdByProject for the project
useSessionStore > getActiveSessionForProject > returns the active session id
useSessionStore > getActiveSessionForProject > returns null for unknown project
useSessionStore > handleProcessExit > marks session status as closed and appends [exited] to title
useSessionStore > handleProcessExit > is a no-op for unknown session id
useSessionStore > bell counts > incrementBellCount increases count
useSessionStore > bell counts > clearBellCount removes entry
useSessionStore > bell counts > clearBellCount is a no-op when count is already 0
useSessionStore > bell counts > getBellCountForSession returns 0 for unknown session
useSessionStore > bell counts > getBellCountForProject sums bell counts across all project sessions
useSessionStore > setTerminalInstance / getTerminalInstance > stores and retrieves terminal instance by sessionId
useSessionStore > setTerminalInstance / getTerminalInstance > returns undefined for unknown session
useSettingsStore > loadSettings > loads and stores global settings
useSettingsStore > loadSettings > falls back to DEFAULT_SETTINGS when global settings is null
useSettingsStore > loadSettings > loads workspace settings when workspaceId is provided
useSettingsStore > loadSettings > sets resolvedTheme based on merged settings
useSettingsStore > updateGlobalTheme > calls updateGlobal and updates store
useSettingsStore > updateWorkspaceTheme > calls updateWorkspace and updates workspace settings map
useSettingsStore > updateScrollbackLimit > calls updateGlobal with scrollbackLimit and updates store
useSettingsStore > updateWorktreeBaseDir > calls updateGlobal with worktreeBaseDir
useSettingsStore > updateWorkspaceWorktreeBaseDir > calls updateWorkspace with git override when dir is provided
useSettingsStore > updateWorkspaceWorktreeBaseDir > calls updateWorkspace with undefined git override when dir is undefined
useSettingsStore > resolveSettings > returns defaults merged with global settings when no workspace
useSettingsStore > resolveSettings > merges workspace overrides over global settings
useSettingsStore > resolveSettings > uses defaults when globalSettings is null
useSettingsStore > resolveSettings > ignores workspace overrides when no workspace id provided
useToastStore > addToast > adds a toast with a unique id and specified type/message
useToastStore > addToast > defaults duration to 3500ms for non-error toasts
useToastStore > addToast > defaults duration to 6000ms for error toasts
useToastStore > addToast > respects explicit duration override
useToastStore > addToast > generates unique ids for multiple toasts
useToastStore > addToast > auto-removes toast after duration expires
useToastStore > addToast > does not remove other toasts when one expires
useToastStore > removeToast > removes the toast with the given id
useToastStore > removeToast > does not remove other toasts
useToastStore > removeToast > is a no-op for unknown id
useWorkspaceStore > loadWorkspaces > fetches and stores workspace list
useWorkspaceStore > loadWorkspaces > stores empty array when result has no workspaces
useWorkspaceStore > createWorkspace > appends new workspace to list
useWorkspaceStore > createWorkspace > returns the api result directly (including errors)
useWorkspaceStore > updateWorkspace > replaces workspace in list by id
useWorkspaceStore > deleteWorkspace > removes workspace from list
useWorkspaceStore > deleteWorkspace > clears activeWorkspaceId when deleted workspace was active
useWorkspaceStore > deleteWorkspace > does not clear activeWorkspaceId when a different workspace is deleted
useWorkspaceStore > deleteWorkspace > removes projects map entry for deleted workspace
useWorkspaceStore > setActiveWorkspace > sets activeWorkspaceId and clears activeProjectId
useWorkspaceStore > setActiveWorkspace > triggers loadProjects for the new workspace
useWorkspaceStore > setActiveWorkspace > sets activeWorkspaceId to null when called with null
useWorkspaceStore > loadProjects > stores projects under workspaceId key
useWorkspaceStore > createProject > appends project to workspace entry
useWorkspaceStore > createProject > creates workspace entry if it does not exist yet
useWorkspaceStore > updateProjectBranch > updates matching project in the map
useWorkspaceStore > renameProject > renames matching project in the map
useWorkspaceStore > reorderWorkspaces > reorders workspaces by given ids
useWorkspaceStore > reorderWorkspaces > appends workspaces not in the ids list at the end
useWorkspaceStore > reorderProjects > reorders projects within the workspace
useWorkspaceStore > deleteProject > removes project from its workspace
useWorkspaceStore > deleteProject > clears activeProjectId when deleted project was active
useWorkspaceStore > deleteProject > does not clear activeProjectId when a different project is deleted
useWorkspaceStore > setActiveProject > sets activeProjectId
useWorkspaceStore > setActiveProject > sets activeProjectId to null
useKeyboardShortcuts > calls onOpenSettings when Cmd+, is pressed
useKeyboardShortcuts > calls onToggleLog when Cmd+Shift+L is pressed
useKeyboardShortcuts > switches to workspace by number when Cmd+1 is pressed
useKeyboardShortcuts > switches to second workspace when Cmd+2 is pressed
useKeyboardShortcuts > does nothing for out-of-range workspace index
useKeyboardShortcuts > cycles to next workspace on Cmd+=
useKeyboardShortcuts > cycles to previous workspace on Cmd+-
useKeyboardShortcuts > creates new session on Cmd+T when project is active
useKeyboardShortcuts > does not create session on Cmd+T when no active project
useKeyboardShortcuts > cycles tabs on Cmd+ArrowRight when sessions exist
useKeyboardShortcuts > cycles tabs on Cmd+ArrowLeft when sessions exist
useKeyboardShortcuts > removes keydown listener on unmount
useKeyboardShortcuts > calls extension shortcut action when accelerator matches
useTerminalSession > returns a createSession function
useTerminalSession > createSession calls store createSession with correct args
useTerminalSession > createSession stores terminal instance and activates session
useTerminalSession > createSession returns the session id
AlertBadge > renders nothing when count is 0
AlertBadge > renders nothing when count is negative
AlertBadge > renders count when count is positive
AlertBadge > shows 99+ when count exceeds 99
AlertBadge > shows exact count at 99
AlertBadge > has correct aria-label for single alert
AlertBadge > has correct aria-label for multiple alerts
AlertBadge > applies className prop to rendered span
AlertBadge > applies alert-badge class by default
BranchSwitcher > renders branch name
BranchSwitcher > renders branch icon
BranchSwitcher > returns null when project has no gitBranch and no worktreePath
BranchSwitcher > opens dropdown when trigger is clicked
BranchSwitcher > shows branches after opening dropdown
BranchSwitcher > shows remote branches section
BranchSwitcher > shows loading state while fetching branches
BranchSwitcher > shows error state when branch fetch fails
BranchSwitcher > shows no branches message when both lists are empty
BranchSwitcher > checks out branch when a branch is selected
BranchSwitcher > shows error toast when checkout fails
BranchSwitcher > toggles closed when trigger is clicked again
BranchSwitcher > uses worktreePath as cwd when project has worktreePath
BranchSwitcher > shows checkmark for current branch
CreateProjectDialog > renders dialog title
CreateProjectDialog > calls onClose when Cancel is clicked
CreateProjectDialog > shows name validation error when empty
CreateProjectDialog > submits with valid name for simple project
CreateProjectDialog > renders Create button
CreateWorkspaceDialog > renders dialog with title and form fields
CreateWorkspaceDialog > calls onClose when Cancel is clicked
CreateWorkspaceDialog > shows validation error when name is empty on blur
CreateWorkspaceDialog > shows duplicate name error
CreateWorkspaceDialog > calls createWorkspace on submit with valid name
CreateWorkspaceDialog > renders color swatches
CreateWorkspaceDialog > renders folder path input
CreateWorkspaceDialog > does not submit with empty name
EditWorkspaceDialog > renders with workspace name pre-filled
EditWorkspaceDialog > calls onClose when Cancel is clicked
EditWorkspaceDialog > shows Name is required when name is cleared
EditWorkspaceDialog > calls updateWorkspace on valid submit
EditWorkspaceDialog > renders color swatches
EditWorkspaceDialog > renders folder path field
ErrorBoundary > renders children when no error occurs
ErrorBoundary > renders error UI when a child throws
ErrorBoundary > shows recovery button when error occurs
ErrorBoundary > logs error to console when child throws
ErrorBoundary > clears error state when recovery button is clicked
GlobalSettings > shows loading when globalSettings is null
GlobalSettings > renders theme options
GlobalSettings > calls updateGlobalTheme when theme is changed
GlobalSettings > renders scrollback limit input with current value
GlobalSettings > calls updateScrollbackLimit for valid scrollback value
GlobalSettings > does not call updateScrollbackLimit for below-minimum value
GlobalSettings > does not call updateScrollbackLimit for above-maximum value
GlobalSettings > calls updateWorktreeBaseDir on blur of worktree input
GlobalSettings > calls electronAPI.settings.updateGlobal when default shell is changed
LogWindow > renders dialog with title
LogWindow > shows empty state when no entries
LogWindow > renders log entries with level and message
LogWindow > calls clear when Clear button is clicked
LogWindow > calls onClose when close button is clicked
LogWindow > calls onClose when Escape key is pressed
LogWindow > renders warn and log level labels
NewTabDialog > renders title and form fields
NewTabDialog > calls onClose when Cancel is clicked
NewTabDialog > submits with default title when empty
NewTabDialog > submits with custom title
NewTabDialog > uses Agent as default title for agent type
NewTabDialog > uses worktree path when project has worktreePath
NewTabDialog > uses workspace folderPath when project has no worktreePath
ProjectItem > renders project name
ProjectItem > applies active class when project is active
ProjectItem > calls setActiveProject when clicked
ProjectItem > shows context menu on right-click
ProjectItem > shows ConfirmDialog when Remove is clicked
ProjectItem > calls deleteProject when ConfirmDialog is confirmed
ProjectItem > does not delete when ConfirmDialog is cancelled
ProjectItem > closes context menu when clicking elsewhere
ProjectsPanel > renders workspace name in header
ProjectsPanel > shows project count
ProjectsPanel > shows plural projects count
ProjectsPanel > renders project name
ProjectsPanel > renders New project button
ProjectsPanel > opens CreateProjectDialog when New project is clicked
ProjectsPanel > closes CreateProjectDialog when onClose is called
ProjectsPanel > returns empty fragment when workspace not found
ProjectsPanel > renders workspace tags when present
ProjectsPanel > sets active project when project card is clicked
ProjectsPanel > opens context menu when options button is clicked
ProjectsPanel > shows confirm dialog when Remove project is clicked
ProjectsPanel > starts rename mode on double-click of project name
ProjectsPanel > cancels rename on Escape key
ProjectsPanel > commits rename on Enter key
ProjectsPanel > shows Projects section label when projects exist
ProjectsPanel > does not show Projects label when no projects
ProjectsPanel > deletes project when confirm dialog is confirmed
SettingsPanel > renders Settings title
SettingsPanel > shows GlobalSettings by default
SettingsPanel > shows Extensions nav item
SettingsPanel > hides Workspace Settings nav when no active workspace
SettingsPanel > shows Workspace Settings nav when a workspace is active
SettingsPanel > switches to workspace section when Workspace Settings is clicked
SettingsPanel > calls onClose when close button is clicked
SettingsPanel > calls onClose when overlay is clicked
SettingsPanel > calls onClose on Escape key
ExtensionsSection > shows empty message when no extensions
ExtensionsSection > renders installed extensions list
ExtensionsSection > shows Disable button for enabled extensions
ExtensionsSection > shows Enable button for disabled extensions
ExtensionsSection > shows Install from Directory button
ExtensionsSection > calls openDirectory when install button is clicked
ExtensionsSection > installs extension and shows it in list
ExtensionsSection > shows toast on install error
ExtensionsSection > toggles extension enable/disable
Sidebar > renders workspaces section
Sidebar > renders workspace items
Sidebar > renders extension sidebar items when loaded
Sidebar > toggles collapsed state when toggle button is clicked
Sidebar > hides Create Workspace button when collapsed
Sidebar > opens CreateWorkspaceDialog when Create button is clicked
TabBar > renders Terminal primary tab
TabBar > renders extension-contributed tabs
TabBar > shows new tab button when Terminal is active
TabBar > hides session sub-tab bar when extension tab is active
TabBar > renders sessions as tabs
TabBar > calls closeSession when close button is clicked
TabBar > opens new tab dialog when + button is clicked
TabBar > calls setActiveSessionForProject when session tab is clicked
TerminalPane > shows empty state when no sessions
TerminalPane > renders container when sessions exist
TerminalPane > clears bell count when active session changes
TerminalPane > does not crash when terminal instance is undefined
TerminalInstance > constructs without throwing
TerminalInstance > subscribes to terminal output on construction
TerminalInstance > creates a div element on construction
TerminalInstance > accepts an optional onBell callback
TerminalInstance > does not call onBell setup when callback is not provided
TerminalInstance > mount() > appends element to container and opens terminal
TerminalInstance > mount() > does not re-open terminal on second mount
TerminalInstance > unmount() > removes element from DOM
TerminalInstance > unmount() > does not throw when called before mount
TerminalInstance > dispose() > unsubscribes from output and disposes terminal
TerminalInstance > dispose() > does not throw when called without mounting first
ToastContainer > renders empty container with no toasts
ToastContainer > renders info toast
ToastContainer > renders success toast
ToastContainer > renders error toast
ToastContainer > renders warning toast
ToastContainer > calls removeToast when dismiss button is clicked
ToastContainer > renders multiple toasts
WorkspaceItem > renders workspace name
WorkspaceItem > renders collapsed initials (MW for "My Work")
WorkspaceItem > toggles expanded and shows projects when active workspace clicked
WorkspaceItem > shows Add Project button when expanded and active
WorkspaceItem > shows context menu on right-click with Edit and Remove buttons
WorkspaceItem > opens EditWorkspaceDialog when Edit is clicked from context menu
WorkspaceItem > context menu has Remove option for dangerous action
WorkspaceItem > shows confirm dialog then calls deleteWorkspace on confirm
WorkspaceItem > closes confirm dialog without deleting on cancel
WorkspaceItem > opens CreateProjectDialog when Add Project is clicked
WorkspaceItem > shows context menu on right-click in collapsed mode
WorkspaceItem > opens edit dialog from collapsed context menu
WorkspaceItem > renders extension context menu items when provided
WorkspaceItem > calls contextMenuClick when extension item clicked
WorkspaceRail > renders workspace initials
WorkspaceRail > renders create button
WorkspaceRail > opens CreateWorkspaceDialog when + is clicked
WorkspaceRail > renders empty rail with no workspaces
WorkspaceRail > shows active workspace with active class
WorkspaceRail > calls setActiveWorkspace when workspace tile is clicked
WorkspaceRail > shows context menu on right-click
WorkspaceRail > opens EditWorkspaceDialog from context menu
WorkspaceRail > shows confirm dialog and calls deleteWorkspace on confirm
WorkspaceRail > closes confirm dialog without deleting on cancel
WorkspaceRail > calls reorderWorkspaces on drag and drop between tiles
WorkspaceRail > does not reorder when dropping on same index
WorkspaceRail > shows dnd-over class on drag over
WorkspaceRail > clears dnd-over class on drag leave
WorkspaceSettings > shows loading when globalSettings is null
WorkspaceSettings > renders workspace name in title
WorkspaceSettings > shows workspaceId when workspace not found
WorkspaceSettings > calls loadSettings on mount
WorkspaceSettings > renders theme radio options
WorkspaceSettings > calls updateWorkspaceTheme when theme is changed
WorkspaceSettings > calls updateWorkspaceScrollback for valid value
WorkspaceSettings > does not call updateWorkspaceScrollback for out-of-range value
create-extension.js CLI > exits 0 and creates extension directory
create-extension.js CLI > generates valid manifest.json
create-extension.js CLI > uses custom --id when provided
create-extension.js CLI > exits 2 on directory collision
create-extension.js CLI > exits 1 for invalid name
create-extension.js CLI > exits 0 with --help
create-extension.js CLI > generated src/index.js is valid JavaScript with activate/deactivate
extension IPC handlers > extension:list > returns extensions from host
extension IPC handlers > extension:install > calls load with directoryPath and returns result
extension IPC handlers > extension:toggle > returns extension on successful toggle
extension IPC handlers > extension:toggle > returns NOT_FOUND error when toggle returns null
extension IPC handlers > extension:get-sidebar-items > returns empty items when registry has none
extension IPC handlers > extension:get-sidebar-items > returns mapped sidebar items from registry
extension IPC handlers > extension:get-context-menu-items > returns empty items when no items match target
extension IPC handlers > extension:get-context-menu-items > returns only items matching the given target
extension IPC handlers > extension:context-menu-click > calls onClick for the matching context menu item
extension IPC handlers > extension:context-menu-click > does not call onClick when target does not match
extension IPC handlers > extension:context-menu-click > does not crash when no matching item exists
fs IPC handlers > fs:watch-start > calls watchStart and returns ok for valid payload
fs IPC handlers > fs:watch-start > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when projectRoot is missing
fs IPC handlers > fs:watch-start > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when projectRoot is an empty string
fs IPC handlers > fs:watch-stop > calls watchStop and returns ok
fs IPC handlers > fs:read-file > reads file and returns content
fs IPC handlers > fs:read-file > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when filePath is missing
fs IPC handlers > fs:read-file > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when filePath is empty string
fs IPC handlers > fs:read-file > returns FILE_NOT_FOUND when readFile rejects
fs IPC handlers > fs watcher event forwarding > registers a watcher handler that sends fs:changed events to the window
fs IPC handlers > fs watcher event forwarding > does not crash when main window is null
git-integration extension: git:status IPC handler > returns GitStatus for a valid git repo path
git-integration extension: git:status IPC handler > returns error for non-repo path
git-integration extension: git:status IPC handler > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing path
git-integration extension: git:diff-file IPC handler > returns FileDiff for staged file
git-integration extension: git:diff-file IPC handler > returns binary flag for binary file
git-integration extension: git:stage / git:unstage IPC handlers > stages a file
git-integration extension: git:stage / git:unstage IPC handlers > returns error for empty paths array on stage
git-integration extension: git:stage / git:unstage IPC handlers > unstages a file
git-integration extension: git:commit IPC handler > commits staged changes and returns hash
git-integration extension: git:commit IPC handler > returns EMPTY_MESSAGE when message is empty
git-integration extension: git:commit IPC handler > returns NOTHING_TO_COMMIT when no staged files
core git IPC handlers > git:is-repo returns true for a git repo
core git IPC handlers > git:is-repo returns false for a non-repo path
core git IPC handlers > git:current-branch returns the current branch
core git IPC handlers > git:checkout switches to branch
core git IPC handlers > git:is-repo returns false for invalid payload
core git IPC handlers > git:is-repo returns false when service throws
core git IPC handlers > git:current-branch returns INVALID_PATH for empty path
core git IPC handlers > git:current-branch returns error string when service throws
core git IPC handlers > git:list-branches returns empty array for invalid payload
core git IPC handlers > git:list-branches returns branches on success
core git IPC handlers > git:list-branches returns empty array when service throws
core git IPC handlers > git:checkout returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing branch
core git IPC handlers > git:checkout returns error string when checkout fails
core git IPC handlers > git:suggest-worktree-path returns empty path for invalid payload
core git IPC handlers > git:suggest-worktree-path returns suggested path
core git IPC handlers > git:suggest-worktree-path passes optional baseDir
core git IPC handlers > git:create-worktree returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid payload
core git IPC handlers > git:create-worktree returns success
core git IPC handlers > git:create-worktree returns error string on failure
core git IPC handlers > git:remove-worktree returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid payload
core git IPC handlers > git:remove-worktree returns success
core git IPC handlers > git:remove-worktree returns error string on failure
core git IPC handlers > git:list-worktrees returns empty array for invalid payload
core git IPC handlers > git:list-worktrees returns worktrees on success
core git IPC handlers > git:list-worktrees returns empty array when service throws
settings IPC handlers > settings:get-global > returns global settings from store
settings IPC handlers > settings:update-global > calls updateGlobalSettings with patch and returns updated settings
settings IPC handlers > settings:get-workspace > returns workspace-specific settings
settings IPC handlers > settings:update-workspace > calls updateWorkspaceSettings with workspaceId and patch
shell:exec IPC handler > executes a valid git command and returns ShellResult
shell:exec IPC handler > returns COMMAND_NOT_ALLOWED for non-allowlisted command
shell:exec IPC handler > returns CWD_OUT_OF_SCOPE when cwd escapes workspace
shell:exec IPC handler > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid payload schema
shell:exec IPC handler > returns generic error string for unexpected exceptions
shell:exec IPC handler > calls assertCwdInScope only when workspaceRoot is provided
shell:open-path IPC handler > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for empty filePath
shell:open-path IPC handler > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing filePath
terminal IPC handlers > terminal:create > returns a sessionId when given a valid payload
terminal IPC handlers > terminal:create > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when projectId is not a UUID
terminal IPC handlers > terminal:create > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when type is invalid
terminal IPC handlers > terminal:create > accepts agent session type
terminal IPC handlers > terminal:close > terminates the PTY for the given sessionId
terminal IPC handlers > terminal:input > routes data to the correct PTY instance
workspace IPC handlers > workspace:list > returns workspaces from store
workspace IPC handlers > workspace:create > forwards payload to createWorkspace and returns result
workspace IPC handlers > workspace:update > forwards payload to updateWorkspace and returns result
workspace IPC handlers > workspace:delete > calls deleteWorkspace with the id
workspace IPC handlers > workspace:reorder > calls reorderWorkspaces with payload
workspace IPC handlers > project:list > returns projects for the given workspaceId
workspace IPC handlers > project:create > calls createProject with payload and returns result
workspace IPC handlers > project:update-branch > calls updateProjectBranch with payload and returns result
workspace IPC handlers > project:rename > calls renameProject with payload and returns result
workspace IPC handlers > project:reorder > calls reorderProjects with payload
workspace IPC handlers > project:delete > calls deleteProject with the id
ChapterFileList > renders file names
ChapterFileList > calls onSelectFile when file row is clicked
ChapterFileList > calls onSelectFile when Enter is pressed on file row
ChapterFileList > marks active file with active class
ChapterFileList > shows viewed check for viewed files
ChapterFileList > shows file additions and deletions
ChapterFileList > shows why-here text
ChapterFileList > respects fileOrderOverrides for file order
ChapterFileList > renders row numbers
ChapterFileList > calls reorderFiles on drag and drop between rows
ChapterFileList > does not reorder when dropping on the same index
ChapterFileList > sets drag-over class when dragging over a row
ChapterFileList > clears drag state on drag end
ChapterNav > returns null when only one chapter
ChapterNav > renders tabs for multiple chapters
ChapterNav > calls setCurrentChapter when a tab is clicked
ChapterNav > marks active chapter with aria-selected=true
ChapterNav > shows complete checkmark when all files in chapter are viewed
ChapterNav > shows file count and estimate time for each chapter
ChapterNav > renders tablist with correct aria-label
CommentComposer (new comment) > renders Write and Preview tabs
CommentComposer (new comment) > renders textarea in write mode
CommentComposer (new comment) > switches to preview tab
CommentComposer (new comment) > shows RichContent when body is non-empty in preview
CommentComposer (new comment) > calls onCancel when Cancel is clicked
CommentComposer (new comment) > disables Comment button when body is empty
CommentComposer (new comment) > enables Comment button when body has content
CommentComposer (new comment) > calls prCommentAdd on submit
CommentComposer (new comment) > shows error when submission fails
CommentComposer (reply) > calls prCommentReply on submit
CommentComposer (reply) > shows error when reply submission returns error field
FileDiffView > shows empty state when diff is null
FileDiffView > shows binary message for binary files
FileDiffView > renders file path in toolbar
FileDiffView > renders renamed file as oldPath → path
FileDiffView > renders hunk header in unified mode
FileDiffView > shows Unified and Split toggle buttons
FileDiffView > switches to split view when Split is clicked
FileDiffView > switches back to unified view from split
FileDiffView > shows stale banner when isStale is true
FileDiffView > calls onRefresh when Refresh is clicked in stale banner
FileDiffView > shows truncation notice for truncated diffs
FileDiffView > renders add/remove lines with correct classes
FileDiffView > renders split view with hunk header
FileDiffView > renders a diff with only removes correctly in split view
FileDiffView > renders a diff with only adds correctly in split view
FullFileList > renders summary with file counts
FullFileList > renders chapter name
FullFileList > renders file names
FullFileList > shows file additions and deletions
FullFileList > calls onSelectFile when file row is clicked
FullFileList > toggles chapter collapsed state when header is clicked
FullFileList > marks viewed files with check indicator
FullFileList > marks active file with active class
FullFileList > shows progress per chapter
FullFileList > shows estimated minutes in summary
FullFileList > shows done check when chapter is complete
FullFileList > respects fileOrderOverrides for chapter file order
GitFullView > shows "No project selected" when repoRoot is null
GitFullView > renders staging area and diff view when repoRoot provided
GitFullView > renders commit message textarea
GitFullView > shows hint when no files are staged
GitFullView > shows "Enter a commit message" hint when files staged but no message
GitFullView > disables Commit button when no staged files
GitFullView > calls commit when Commit is clicked with staged files and message
GitFullView > shows commit error message when commit returns error
GitFullView > calls commit and push when Commit & Push is clicked
GitFullView > opens PR dialog when Open PR is clicked
GitFullView > closes PR dialog when ClosePrDialog is clicked
GitFullView > closes PR dialog and dispatches event when PR is created
GitFullView > shows char count when commit message exceeds 50 chars
GitFullView > fetches diff when file is selected
GitFullView > shows push error when push fails after commit & push
GitSidebarPanel — loading state > renders skeleton rows when status is null
GitSidebarPanel — loading state > does not render loading text when using skeleton
HealthChips > renders all chip labels
HealthChips > shows pass for test file present
HealthChips > shows fail for test file missing
HealthChips > shows unknown for null testFilePresent
HealthChips > shows CI passing chip with pass status
HealthChips > shows CI failing chip with fail status
HealthChips > shows CI pending with warn status
HealthChips > shows coverage percentage from metrics
HealthChips > shows coverage warn when between 50 and 79
HealthChips > shows coverage fail when below 50
HealthChips > shows complexity delta as +N for positive values
HealthChips > shows complexity delta as ±0 for zero
HealthChips > shows complexity delta as negative for negative values
HealthChips > shows churn value in correct format
HealthChips > shows blast radius in importers format
HealthChips > shows ? for null churn value
HealthChips > shows lint clean for pass status
HealthChips > shows lint errors for fail status
HealthChips > shows lint warnings for warn status
HealthChips > renders as accessible list
InlineCommentThread > renders comment author
InlineCommentThread > renders comment body
InlineCommentThread > shows outdated label when thread is outdated
InlineCommentThread > does not show outdated label when not outdated
InlineCommentThread > shows reply button when onReply is provided
InlineCommentThread > calls onReply with thread id when reply button clicked
InlineCommentThread > does not show reply button when onReply is not provided
InlineCommentThread > shows "show more replies" button when thread is collapsed with multiple comments
InlineCommentThread > expands collapsed thread when show more is clicked
InlineCommentThread > shows singular "reply" label for single hidden comment
InlineCommentThread > renders avatar image
PrReviewTab > shows empty message when repoRoot is null
PrReviewTab > renders ReviewQueue when repoRoot is provided
PrReviewTab > renders PrReviewView when activePr is set
PrReviewTab > shows pop out button
PrReviewTab > calls openPrReview when pop out button is clicked
PrReviewTab > closes PR view when onClose is called
PrReviewTab > calls setIncludeClosedPrs when toggle closed is clicked
PrReviewView > renders the diff pane when chapter and file are available
PrReviewView > renders chapter file list in guided mode
PrReviewView > shows chapter nav for multi-chapter PRs
PrReviewView > does not show chapter nav for single-chapter PRs
PrReviewView > shows submit panel when Submit button clicked
PrReviewView > hides submit panel when CloseSubmit clicked
PrReviewView > calls setPaused and onClose when Pause is clicked
PrReviewView > shows risk panel when ShowRisk is clicked
PrReviewView > calls markFileViewed and advances file on MarkViewed
PrReviewView > shows All-files mode when viewMode is switched to full
PrReviewView > switches back to guided mode from full mode
PrReviewView > calls onRefresh when Refresh button is clicked
PrReviewView > shows empty state message when no active file
ReviewDiffPane > renders file path in header
ReviewDiffPane > renders health chips
ReviewDiffPane > shows additions and deletions
ReviewDiffPane > shows LOW RISK label for low risk file
ReviewDiffPane > shows HIGH RISK label for high risk file
ReviewDiffPane > shows binary message for binary files
ReviewDiffPane > shows loading diff message while fetching
ReviewDiffPane > shows error when diff fetch fails
ReviewDiffPane > shows viewed badge when file is already viewed
ReviewDiffPane > shows Finish chapter button when on last file
ReviewDiffPane > shows Mark viewed button when not on last file
ReviewDiffPane > calls onPause when Pause review is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > calls onOpenSubmit when Submit review is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > calls onShowRisk when why? button is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > calls onPrevFile when ← Prev is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > renders diff hunks when diff is loaded
ReviewDiffPane > shows change badge for non-modified files
ReviewDiffPane > calls patchFileComplexity after diff load
ReviewDiffPane > switches to split view mode when Split button is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > opens composer when gutter button is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > closes composer when cancel is clicked
ReviewDiffPane > renders inline comment threads on matching lines
ReviewDiffPane > fires keyboard navigation events for prev-file and mark-viewed-next
ReviewDiffPane > shows MED RISK label for medium risk file
ReviewQueue > shows loading state when queueLoading is true
ReviewQueue > shows empty state when queue is empty
ReviewQueue > shows stat cards
ReviewQueue > renders PR rows when queue has PRs
ReviewQueue > calls onOpenPr when PR row is clicked
ReviewQueue > shows refresh button
ReviewQueue > calls onRefresh when refresh button is clicked
ReviewQueue > shows search input
ReviewQueue > shows filter pills when not searching
ReviewQueue > hides filter pills when searching
ReviewQueue > shows "Open only" button by default
ReviewQueue > shows "Open + Closed" when includeClosedPrs is true
ReviewQueue > calls onToggleClosedPrs when toggle button is clicked
ReviewQueue > shows error state when queueError is set
ReviewQueue > shows rate limit banner when rateLimitState is set
ReviewQueue > shows load more button when hasMorePrs is true
ReviewQueue > renders HIGH label for high-risk PRs
ReviewQueue > shows Draft label for draft PRs
ReviewQueue > shows Resume action for paused PRs
ReviewQueue > applies active filter pill when clicked
ReviewSubmitPanel > renders submit review heading
ReviewSubmitPanel > renders three radio options
ReviewSubmitPanel > defaults to Comment radio option
ReviewSubmitPanel > changes radio selection when clicking Approve
ReviewSubmitPanel > renders a textarea for review body
ReviewSubmitPanel > renders Cancel and Submit review buttons
ReviewSubmitPanel > calls onClose when Cancel is clicked
ReviewSubmitPanel > shows success state after successful submission
ReviewSubmitPanel > shows close button after successful submission
ReviewSubmitPanel > shows error when submission fails
ReviewSubmitPanel > shows error when result contains error field
ReviewSubmitPanel > calls prReviewSubmit with correct args
RichContent > renders children inside markdown component
RichContent > applies rich-content class
RichContent > applies additional className when provided
RichContent > does not add extra class when className is not provided
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders the risk level in heading
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders the dominant driver text
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders composite score
RiskBreakdownPanel > does not render composite score when null
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders metric row labels
RiskBreakdownPanel > shows "?" for unknown metric values
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders file path at bottom
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders importers list when topImporters is not empty
RiskBreakdownPanel > calls openPath when importer is clicked
RiskBreakdownPanel > shows "Show N more" when importers exceed initial limit
RiskBreakdownPanel > expands all importers when "Show more" is clicked
RiskBreakdownPanel > shows test file as present when testFilePresent is true
RiskBreakdownPanel > shows test file as missing when testFilePresent is false
RiskBreakdownPanel > renders as accessible aside
StagingArea — file status badge tooltips > badge for "modified" has title="modified"
StagingArea — file status badge tooltips > badge for "added" has title="added"
StagingArea — file status badge tooltips > badge for "deleted" has title="deleted"
StagingArea — file status badge tooltips > badge for "renamed" has title="renamed"
StagingArea — file status badge tooltips > badge for "untracked" has title="untracked"
StagingArea — file status badge tooltips > badge for "conflicted" has title="conflicted"
StagingArea — states > shows loading state when status is null
StagingArea — states > shows empty staged/unstaged sections
StagingArea — states > shows truncation banner when truncated is true
StagingArea — states > renders staged and unstaged files in correct sections
StagingArea — states > shows Unstage All button when files are staged
StagingArea — states > shows Stage All button when files are unstaged
StagingArea — interactions > calls onFileSelect when a file row is clicked
StagingArea — interactions > calls git.stage and refreshes when unstaged checkbox is checked
StagingArea — interactions > calls git.unstage when staged checkbox is unchecked
StagingArea — interactions > calls git.stage for all unstaged files when Stage All is clicked
StagingArea — interactions > calls git.unstage for all staged files when Unstage All is clicked
StagingArea — interactions > disables checkbox for conflicted files
StagingArea — interactions > highlights selected file row
StatusChecksBar > renders nothing when checks array is empty
StatusChecksBar > shows passing summary when all checks pass
StatusChecksBar > shows failing count when any check fails
StatusChecksBar > shows pending count when any check is pending and none fail
StatusChecksBar > prioritises fail over pending in summary
StatusChecksBar > collapsed by default — individual checks not visible
StatusChecksBar > expands to show individual checks on click
StatusChecksBar > collapses again on second click
StatusChecksBar > shows correct icon for each state in expanded list
StatusChecksBar > renders link-out anchor when url is provided
StatusChecksBar > does not render link-out anchor when url is absent
StatusChecksBar > summary button has correct aria-expanded attribute
StatusChecksBar > shows singular "check" label for a single check
buildChapters() > returns empty array for empty input
buildChapters() > returns a single chapter for a single file
buildChapters() > groups files by top-level directory segment
buildChapters() > places type/interface files in tier 0
buildChapters() > places *.spec.* and *.test.* files in tier 2
buildChapters() > places lock files and generated files in tier 3
buildChapters() > tier 0 files appear before tier 1 within the same chapter
buildChapters() > tier 2 files appear after tier 1 within the same chapter
buildChapters() > all-mechanical files form their own chapter with tier 3
buildChapters() > applies fileOrderOverrides when provided
buildChapters() > includes a whyHere label for every file
buildChapters() > sets estimatedMinutes on each chapter as sum of file estimates
GhService.checkAuth() > resolves true when gh auth status exits 0
GhService.checkAuth() > resolves false when gh exits non-zero
GhService.checkAuth() > resolves false when gh is not found
GhService.getPrForBranch() > returns PullRequest when PR exists
GhService.getPrForBranch() > returns null when no PR found
GhService.getPrForBranch() > throws on unexpected gh error
GhService.createPr() > returns created PullRequest with url
GhService.createPr() > creates draft PR when isDraft=true
parseStatus() > parses a modified unstaged file
parseStatus() > parses a staged new file (A)
parseStatus() > parses an untracked file (??)
parseStatus() > parses a deleted file (D)
parseStatus() > parses a renamed file (R) with original path
parseStatus() > parses a conflicted file (UU)
parseStatus() > sets truncated=true when file count exceeds maxFiles
parseStatus() > returns empty files array for empty output
parseStatus() > handles multiple files
parseDiff() > parses hunk header
parseDiff() > parses add lines (green)
parseDiff() > parses remove lines (red)
parseDiff() > parses context lines
parseDiff() > detects binary files
parseDiff() > sets truncated flag for large output
parseDiff() > assigns correct line numbers to add/remove/context
github:pr-review-detail > returns a pr object on success with no status checks
github:pr-review-detail > maps SUCCESS conclusion to pass state
github:pr-review-detail > maps FAILURE conclusion to fail state
github:pr-review-detail > maps TIMED_OUT and ACTION_REQUIRED conclusions to fail
github:pr-review-detail > maps IN_PROGRESS and QUEUED to pending state
github:pr-review-detail > maps SKIPPED, NEUTRAL, CANCELLED to skipped state
github:pr-review-detail > maps unknown conclusion string to unknown state
github:pr-review-detail > uses state field when conclusion is absent (StatusContext)
github:pr-review-detail > preserves multiple checks with mixed states
github:pr-review-detail > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing repoRoot
github:pr-file-diff > fetches PR ref with --force so stale local refs do not block the diff
github:pr-file-diff > returns an error when git fetch fails
ReviewSessionSchema > parses a valid session
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts null currentChapterId and currentFilePath
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts null scrollPosition
ReviewSessionSchema > accepts null pausedAt
ReviewSessionSchema > rejects missing repoRoot
ReviewSessionSchema > serialises viewedFiles as an array (Set → array for JSON)
ReviewSessionSchema > session key changes when headSHA changes (force-push invalidation)
detectChangedFiles() > returns empty set when all files are unchanged
detectChangedFiles() > flags files whose addition/deletion counts changed
detectChangedFiles() > flags newly added files
detectChangedFiles() > does not flag files with identical sizes
buildChapters() — cross-reference > returns [] for empty input
parseReviewQueuePR() > maps gh pr list JSON to ReviewQueuePR shape
parseReviewQueuePR() > derives fileCount from files array
parseReviewQueuePR() > sums additions and deletions across all files
parseReviewQueuePR() > derives estimatedMinutes as ceil((additions+deletions)/60)
parseReviewQueuePR() > sets estimatedMinutes to at least 1 for tiny PRs
parseReviewQueuePR() > defaults sessionStatus to not-started
parseReviewQueuePR() > handles empty files array gracefully
computeRiskScore() > returns low risk when all metrics are minimal
computeRiskScore() > returns high risk for the most extreme file in the set
computeRiskScore() > all-null numeric metrics (except testFilePresent) returns composite null
computeRiskScore() > missing test file adds the flat 20-point penalty
computeRiskScore() > sets dominantDriver to a non-empty string
computeRiskScore() > topImporters is capped at 5
computeRiskScore() > composite is between 0 and 100
detectComplexityHotspots() > returns empty array for empty diff
detectComplexityHotspots() > does not flag a hunk with fewer than 5 added decision points
detectComplexityHotspots() > flags a hunk with 5 or more added decision points
detectComplexityHotspots() > subtracts removed decision points from added ones
detectComplexityHotspots() > annotation message includes the delta count
computeFileCyclomaticDelta() > returns 0 for an empty diff
computeFileCyclomaticDelta() > sums deltas across all hunks
useGitStatus > sets status to null when repoRoot is null
useGitStatus > calls setLoading(true) when repoRoot is provided
useGitStatus > calls git.status with the repoRoot
useGitStatus > sets status from successful response
useGitStatus > sets status to null on error response
useGitStatus > sets status to null on exception
useGitStatus > subscribes to fs.onChanged
useGitStatus > unsubscribes from fs.onChanged on unmount
useLoadPrQueue > returns a function
useLoadPrQueue > does nothing when repoRoot is null
useLoadPrQueue > calls listOpenPrs and sets queue on success
useLoadPrQueue > sets queue error when listOpenPrs returns error
useLoadPrQueue > sets rate limit state when RATE_LIMITED error
useLoadPrQueue > sets queue error on exception
useLoadPrQueue > appends to queue when append option is true
useLoadPrQueue > sets hasMorePrs and nextCursor from response
useLoadPrQueue > uses setLoadingMorePrs when appending
useLoadPrDetail > returns a function
useLoadPrDetail > does nothing when repoRoot is null
useLoadPrDetail > calls prReviewDetail and invokes onSuccess callback with parsed data
useLoadPrDetail > does not call onSuccess when result has error
useLoadPrDetail > handles RATE_LIMITED error
useLoadPrDetail > does not crash on exception
testcase.system-err: Failed to load PR detail Error: network fail at /Users/atavares/repos/terminator/extensions/git-integration/tests/unit/usePrReview.spec.tsx:234:42 at file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:146:14 at file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:61:7 at runTest (file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:960:17) at runSuite (file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:1116:15) at runSuite (file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:1116:15) at runFiles (file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:1173:5) at startTests (file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/@vitest/runner/dist/index.js:1182:3) at file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/vitest/dist/chunks/runBaseTests.CyvqmuC9.js:130:11 at withEnv (file:///Users/atavares/repos/terminator/node_modules/vitest/dist/chunks/runBaseTests.CyvqmuC9.js:94:5)

testcase.name: useLoadInlineComments > returns a function
useLoadInlineComments > does nothing when repoRoot is null
useLoadInlineComments > does nothing when activePr is null
useLoadInlineComments > calls prInlineComments and sets threads when activePr is set
useLoadInlineComments > does nothing when result has error
useFetchFileMetrics > returns a function
useFetchFileMetrics > does nothing when repoRoot is null
useFetchFileMetrics > does nothing when no activePr and no prDetail arg
useFetchFileMetrics > fetches file metrics and updates risk scores for chapters with files
